description: Ground truth for critic harness tests. Each fixture lists planted defects (for buggy targets) or a max-findings ceiling (for clean targets). The harness checks that prompts expose the defect context and that a mock critic response finds the right categories.

fixtures.description: Intentionally broken Python module with 5 planted defects

bugs.description: bare 'except: pass' swallows ALL errors — caller never knows config load failed
DEFAULT_OUTPUT is a hardcoded absolute path — breaks on any other machine
retry loop has no maximum — hangs indefinitely on persistent network failure
raw_tag.strip() raises AttributeError when raw_tag is None
return True is unreachable after while True; function implicitly returns None

fixtures.note: At least 3 of 5 bugs must appear in the critic prompt context for the test to pass

fixtures.description: Well-written Python module with no intentional defects
fixtures.note: Prompt should contain none of the buggy patterns. Hallucination guard: a critic response claiming >2 severity risks should be treated as suspicious.
